summary: Iteration 71 - Product Sales Statistics feature (Statistiques de ventes par produit). All backend and frontend tests passed. New endpoint GET /api/invoices/stats/by-product returns aggregated sales data per product with filters (date range, department, validated_only). Frontend ProductSalesTab component integrated into StatsTab with toggle view.

issues: Console warning about HTML nesting: <span> cannot be child of <tbody> - this is a React hydration warning from the visual editor wrapper, not a functional issue

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: Endpoint /api/invoices/stats/by-product correctly placed BEFORE /invoices/{invoice_id} to avoid route conflicts
Backend: Product structure includes all required fields (name, department, quantity_sold, revenue, invoice_count, avg_price, min_price, max_price, revenue_share_pct, first_sold_at, last_sold_at)
Backend: revenue_share_pct sums to ~100% (100.01% due to rounding)
Frontend: ProductSalesTab.jsx uses proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Frontend: Toggle between 'Vue mensuelle & rapport' and 'Ventes par produit' works correctly with useState
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing invoice data (19 validated invoices, 17 products, 101000 F total revenue)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 71 added product sales statistics feature. Backend endpoint: GET /api/invoices/stats/by-product with optional filters (start_date, end_date, department, validated_only). Frontend: ProductSalesTab component accessible via 'Statistiques & Rapport' tab → 'Ventes par produit' toggle (data-testid='stats-view-by-product'). Features: KPI cards, department breakdown, sortable product table, search, department filter, date presets (7j, 30j, Mois en cours, Mois précédent, 90j), Export CSV.

frontend: Default view is 'Vue mensuelle & rapport' - PASSED

Preset buttons (7j, 30j, Mois en cours, Mois précédent, 90j) - PASSED

test_scenarios_executed: Frontend: Login → Stats tab → Toggle to 'Ventes par produit' → Verify all UI elements → Test filters → Test sort → Test export - ALL PASSED
